examples: Specialisation and the effort to increase yields have resulted in the decrease of biodiversity.
The key idea behind professionalisation, argues Menand, is that "the knowledge and skills needed for a particular specialisation are transmissible but bot transferable".
Apart from specialised nerve cells, there is a lot of anatomical specialisation in the brain itself.
Students entering the school's course can choose from one of 14 different areas of specialisation.
